sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85003" key="polu/kuklos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-κυκλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85003.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many circles,</tr_> Id.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολυέλικτον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
